name: ⤑ Calliope
description:
and this! i decided to craft my trollsona's horns one day, and i think they came oUt splendid!

In which you and Calliope talk all about trollsonas.

My first Calliope! She's another character I've never written before just now, but hopefully she comes out alright. Love her and her faux British self. Unrelated to Calliope, I feel like I should add that I am getting requests done swimmingly well. I do recommend getting absolutely anything you have in mind down in the forms now rather than later so I get to it faster. I see everything right as it's sent and I love seeing all the ideas, gives me all the more motivation.

This was a request I received via form.
creator: tacticallyTestified
